examples.title: Simple Embedded System Application - LED Control
examples.description: Demonstrates C usage in embedded systems for controlling hardware peripherals
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates C in embedded systems where direct hardware access through memory-mapped I/O is essential. The use of volatile pointers allows reading/writing to hardware registers at specific memory addresses.

examples.title: File Processing Application - Database Log Manager
examples.description: C commonly used for database and file processing applications requiring high performance
examples.explanation: This demonstrates C's role in database systems. The code shows efficient memory management, file I/O for transaction logging (critical for ACID properties in databases), and buffer management similar to real database systems like MySQL.

examples.title: Python Interpreter Implementation (CPython)
examples.description: Shows how Python interpreter is implemented in C - demonstrating C's role in language runtimes
examples.explanation: This example demonstrates that Python itself is built using C. The CPython interpreter is written in C, showing how C serves as a foundation for other programming languages. Many scripting language interpreters (PHP, Perl, Ruby) are similarly implemented in C.
